programmes.show_name: It's The Wham Bam 80s Party Week!
programmes.show_description: A non-stop ticket to a week of retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.
Fourteen classic videos from 1982 to 1989 - with the help of Fun Boy Three and Lananeeneenoonoo.

programmes.show_name: It's The Wham Bam 80s Party Week!
programmes.show_description: A non-stop ticket to a week of retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.
Two hours of the biggest party tunes, all from 1986. Including Robert Palmer, Janet Jackson, Whitney Houston, Sinitta and Wham!.

programmes.show_name: It's The Wham Bam 80s Party Week!
programmes.show_description: A non-stop ticket to a week of retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.
Bruno Brookes with a quickfire party countdown crossing 2 decades - one from the 80s followed by another from the 90s! Expect Donna Summer, Steps, Sinitta & S-Club 7.

programmes.show_name: It's The Wham Bam 80s Party Week!
programmes.show_description: A non-stop ticket to a week of retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.
In order - four hours of the biggest karaoke anthems of the '80s, from Kool & The Gang and Kim Wilde to Donna Summer and Boy Meets Girl. Prepare to sing out loud!
Two hours of the biggest party tunes - all from 1983!
Denise, Julie and Steve with over two hours of salty videos full of sea, sun and sand! Time to get beach fit with Tight Fit and NOW 80s!

programmes.show_name: It's The Wham Bam 80s Party Week!
programmes.show_description: A non-stop ticket to a week of retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.
New to the NOW 80s archive - another 40 long forgotten pop classics 1980-1989. Including Hall & Oates, Musical Youth, The Blow Monkeys, The Nolans, Stray Cats and Boogie Box High!
New to the NOW 80s archive - another 40 long forgotten pop classics 1980-1989. Including Hall & Oates, Musical Youth, The Blow Monkeys, The Nolans, Stray Cats and Boogie Box High!
NOW 80s rolls out 5 hours of the fiercest females! From Cyndi and Madonna to Whitney, Bananarama and Kylie, it's wall-to-wall singalongs and unapologetic 80s fabulousness!

programmes.show_name: It's The Wham Bam 80s Party Week!
programmes.show_description: A non-stop ticket to a week of retro rave! We crank up the neon and hit the dancefloor with the most electrifying feelgood music videos the 80s had to offer.
Thirty videos about fire, heat and the hot summer sun - whether your Beds Are Burning, you're All Fired Up, Hot In The City or maybe Walking In The Sunshine!
